raw_explain_text:
Nested Loop Join
    -> Seq Scan on regions (full scan across regions)
      full scan on regions in us-east-1
    -> Seq Scan on products (full scan across regions)
      full scan on products in us-west-1
    cross-region distributed execution
    estimated rows: 1000000000 (10 × 100000)
    actual rows: 500000
query: SELECT * FROM regions CROSS JOIN products
notes: Critical performance issue: cross-regional nested loop join with 10 × 100k = 1 billion row cartesian product. Full scans on both tables across different regions. Expected warnings: nested_loop_cost (high) + cross_region_full_scan (CRITICAL) + result_without_limit. Recommendation: Add join condition or rethink query logic.
